prompt_summary: Asked LLM to help structure the Step-by-Step description of the Discovery architecture (Entity Extraction, Proximity Filtering, Exploding Trend Detection, Power-Law Scoring) from Goorha & Ungar (2010).
llm_output_summary: LLM provided a structured breakdown of the four pipeline stages with technical details on character windows, percentage thresholds, and the scoring formula.
modifications_made: Refined wording for clarity, added explicit references to the paper's specific parameter values (100-char window, 50% threshold, 0.95 exponent), and restructured into the mandatory Step-by-Step format.
student_declaration: I declare that this JSON file represents an honest record of the LLM usage for this task. The final content was independently verified against the original paper.
